a.xlink:title: Sends data through UART.
Sends a command and extracts a value from the response.
Sends data through UART.
Sends a simple command and waits for OK/ERROR. Example: sendCommand("AT+JOIN");.
Sends an AT command and captures its response in a text block. Ideal for getters (e....
Sends any AT command to the module, returning error if it fails. Internally uses the LsmAtParser logi...
Sets the communication mode.
Performs a software reset (ATZ Command).
Performs a "Ping" activation by sending AT commands until OK is received. Handles the module's low-po...
Executes a factory reset returning the module to its factory state. Warning: This erases all written ...
Sends a single bit of information. Frame Type 0.
Sends raw hex payload bytes.
Sends standard ASCII string literal.
Retrieves the ABP Frame Counter value.
Checks if Adaptive Data Rate is enabled.
Retrieves the Application EUI.
Retrieves the Application Key.
Retrieves the Application Session Key (ABP).
Retrieves the active regional Frequency Band.
Gets the battery voltage in mV.
Gets the current baudrate configured in the module.
Retrieves the current LoRaWAN Class.
Retrieves the Confirmed uplink retries limit.
Retrieves the current operational Data Rate.
Retrieves the assigned DevAddr.
Retrieves the Device EUI.
Reads the Sigfox Device ID.
Retrieves the current Device Nonce.
Retrieves the Duty Cycle limitation state.
Reads the Sigfox Initial Porting Authorization Code (PAC).
Retrieves the Join1 receive window delay.
Retrieves the Join2 receive window delay.
Gets the local time from the module (e.g. "2024-01-01 12:00:00").
Retrieves the Public/Private network mode definition.
Retrieves the current Network ID.
Retrieves the Network Key.
Retrieves the Network Session Key.
Checks if Payload Encryption is enabled.
Retrieves the active Ping Slot periodicity index.
Checks if Public Key mode is active.
Gets the configured TX power for Sigfox.
Checks the currently active Regional Macro-Channel (RC).
Retrieves the RX1 receive window delay.
Retrieves the Data Rate configured for the RX2 window.
Retrieves the RX2 receive window delay.
Retrieves the Frequency configured for the RX2 window.
Gets the Sigfox stack version.
Retrieves the current Transmission Power index.
Retrieves the Unconfirmed uplink repetitions count.
Gets the module firmware version "APP_VERSION".
